dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Technical vetoes all directional trades due to CHOP ribbon (15¢ spread, below 20¢ clean threshold); Internals provides a bullish counter-signal via risk-on rotation (XLK +1.83%, XLF +1.36%), arguing that high-VIX + institutional sector buying represents a capitulation washout bottom rather than continuation selling.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: The bearish thesis assumes high VIX + flat overnight gap means continued selling, but VIX 26.9 + XLK +1.83% + flat gap is historically consistent with a capitulation bottom forming — not continuation. Macro and Level Thesis acknowledged this divergence but did not fully weight the reversal implication.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: VIX gaps higher to 28+ in the first 30 minutes of RTH, proving fear is still accelerating and invalidating the bullish washout counter-thesis, returning full power to the bearish case.

primary.condition: if SPY breaks below 685.00 support with volume > 1.5× 20-bar average
primary.entry_trigger: 685.00 break + VIX expansion confirmed + momentum divergence

secondary.condition: if SPY holds above 685.00 and rallies through 687.00 toward 688.59
secondary.entry_trigger: 688.59 resistance reclaim + volume confirmation + ribbon_alignment above 30¢ spread

invalidation.condition: VIX prints above 27.5 in the first 30 minutes of RTH, or XLK and XLF both roll to red during regular session
invalidation.effect: Capitulation-bottom validator thesis collapses; risk-on rotation was a trap. Bearish consensus strengthens significantly and 678.03 Carry becomes high-probability target without needing the 685.00 clean-break trigger.

swarm_predictions.claim: 685.00 support will be tested within the first 60 minutes of RTH (by 10:30 ET); if tested with a 5-min bar closing below 685.00 on volume > 1.5× 20-bar average, SPY will extend to at least 683.00 before end of session.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY holds above 686.00 continuously through the first 60 minutes of RTH without touching 685.00, signaling overnight buyers are defending.

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX will not print a new intraday high above 27.5 during RTH; it will close below 26.9, consistent with a fear-spike exhaustion pattern given the flat overnight gap and risk-on sector rotation.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX prints above 27.5 within the first 90 minutes of RTH, confirming fear is still accelerating rather than peaking.

swarm_predictions.claim: Ribbon spread will remain below 30¢ (CHOP classification) for the first 2 hours of RTH (through 11:30 ET), preventing any clean directional entry signal and keeping the session in consolidation between 685.00 and 688.59.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: Ribbon spread widens to 30¢ or above on a 5-min bar before 11:30 ET, triggering a BEAR or BULL read and enabling a directional setup.

synthesis_narrative: The key tension today is a classic fear-divergence setup: VIX at 26.9 (+25% overnight) argues for bearish continuation, but risk-on sector rotation (XLK +1.83%, XLF +1.36%) and a flat overnight gap suggest institutional buyers stepped in overnight, raising the probability of a capitulation washout bottom rather than continuation selling. The bearish consensus (weighted 0.55 vs 0.10) rests on macro regime + asymmetric level structure (7.92-point void below 685.00 vs 2.64-point ceiling at 688.59), but the moderate robustness rating and CHOP ribbon demand patience — the single most important thing to watch at open is whether 685.00 holds or fails on meaningful volume (>1.5× avg), as that is the only clean trigger that resolves the directional ambiguity.

technical.one_line: CHOP ribbon (15¢ spread, below 20¢ threshold) vetoes all directional trades; mixed bar structure with 283k-volume session-end RED reversal bar

macro.one_line: VIX 26.9 HIGH regime rising +25.41% = fear acceleration; zero macro events today; risk-on sector rotation creates VIX-vs-price divergence suggesting possible late-stage washout

level_thesis.one_line: 688.59 Active 2★ resistance caps upside; asymmetric 7.92-point void below 685.00 to Carry 678.03 favors bears if support fails

internals.one_line: Risk-on rotation confirmed (XLK +1.83%, XLF +1.36%, XLE -1.26%); narrow tech leadership in HIGH-VIX environment signals institutional buying INTO the fear spike

validator.top_invalidation: VIX 26.9 + rising VIX + flat gap + risk-on sectors = classic capitulation-bottom fingerprint; bearish agents underweighted the contrarian institutional signal from Internals
